name: YouTube Video Detail
description: Open a YouTube video and return its metadata, the sidebar recommendations, and the top comments. Uses window.ytInitialPlayerResponse for clean metadata and scrolls the page to populate the lazy-loaded comment + recommendation rails.

help.summary: Load a watch page and return metadata + recommendations + comments in one shot.

parameters.name: video_id
parameters.description: YouTube video id (the `v` query parameter on a /watch URL). Pass the id only, not the full URL.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Which sections to return. Defaults to all. `metadata` skips comments + recommendations (fastest). `recommendations` includes metadata + sidebar. `comments` includes metadata + comments.

parameters.name: recommendations_limit
parameters.description: Max sidebar recommendations to return. Defaults to 20.

parameters.name: comments_limit
parameters.description: Max top-level comments to return. Defaults to 20. Higher limits require more scroll rounds and run slower.

examples.command: rzn-browser run youtube video --param video_id="5C_HPTJg5ek" --param include=metadata
rzn-browser run youtube video --param video_id="5C_HPTJg5ek" --param include=comments --param comments_limit=50

help.returns: { url, metadata:{ video_id, title, channel, channel_id, channel_url, duration_seconds, view_count, published, category, keywords[], description, is_live, is_unlisted }, recommendations:[ { kind:"video"|"playlist", id, title, channel?, url, duration?, views?, published?, video_count? } ], comments:[ { author, text, likes, published } ], counts:{ recommendations, comments } }. recommendations and comments are [] when `include` excludes them.
notes: Metadata comes from window.ytInitialPlayerResponse (the same payload the player reads). Fields like view_count and duration_seconds are returned as numbers, not formatted strings.

Age-gated, members-only, or region-blocked videos may still load but ytInitialPlayerResponse can have a `playabilityStatus.status` of `LOGIN_REQUIRED` or `UNPLAYABLE`. When that happens, metadata is returned best-effort from the DOM and a `warning` field is added.

Comments are lazy-loaded by scroll. We scroll up to 6 rounds; if comments are disabled on the video we return []. Replies and pinned flags are not returned — ask for a dedicated comments workflow if you need those.
Recommendations skip Shorts rails and chapter/mix entries. Playlists in the sidebar are returned with kind=playlist.
For search-then-open flows use `youtube search` first, then feed the `video_id` here.

browser_automation.description: Dedicated-tab video-page reader. Navigates to /watch, pulls the player payload, scrolls to populate comments + recommendations, and extracts.

sequences.name: youtube_video
sequences.description: Open /watch?v=<id>, scroll to hydrate rails, extract metadata/recs/comments.

steps.name: Redirect to /watch?v=<video_id>
steps.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const id=cleanArg(arg0);if(!id)throw new Error('video_id is required');if(!/^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{6,20}$/.test(id))throw new Error('video_id looks wrong: '+id);const target='https://www.youtube.com/watch?v='+encodeURIComponent(id);setTimeout(()=>window.location.assign(target),0);return{redirected:true,target};

steps.name: Hydrate rails and extract
steps.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const includeRaw=cleanArg(arg0).toLowerCase();const include=['all','metadata','recommendations','comments'].includes(includeRaw)?includeRaw:'all';const wantRecs=(include==='all'||include==='recommendations');const wantCmts=(include==='all'||include==='comments');const parseN=(v,d,max)=>{const n=parseInt(cleanArg(v),10);if(!Number.isFinite(n)||n<=0)return d;return Math.min(n,max);};const recLimit=parseN(arg1,20,50);const cmtLimit=parseN(arg2,20,100);const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const norm=(s)=>(s||'').replace(/\u00a0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const abs=(h)=>{if(!h)return'';try{return new URL(h,location.origin).toString();}catch{return String(h);}};const pr=window.ytInitialPlayerResponse||{};const vd=pr.videoDetails||{};const mf=(pr.microformat&&pr.microformat.playerMicroformatRenderer)||{};const playability=(pr.playabilityStatus&&pr.playabilityStatus.status)||null;const metadata={video_id:vd.videoId||null,title:vd.title||norm(document.querySelector('ytd-watch-metadata h1')?.textContent||''),channel:vd.author||norm(document.querySelector('ytd-video-owner-renderer ytd-channel-name a')?.textContent||''),channel_id:vd.channelId||null,channel_url:vd.channelId?('https://www.youtube.com/channel/'+vd.channelId):abs(document.querySelector('ytd-video-owner-renderer ytd-channel-name a')?.getAttribute('href')||''),duration_seconds:Number(vd.lengthSeconds)||null,view_count:Number(vd.viewCount)||null,published:mf.publishDate||null,upload_date:mf.uploadDate||null,category:mf.category||null,keywords:Array.isArray(vd.keywords)?vd.keywords:[],description:vd.shortDescription||'',is_live:!!vd.isLiveContent,is_unlisted:!!(mf.isUnlisted),playability_status:playability};const warnings=[];if(playability&&playability!=='OK')warnings.push('playability:'+playability);let recommendations=[];let comments=[];if(wantRecs||wantCmts){const rounds=wantCmts?6:2;let lastHeight=document.body.scrollHeight;for(let i=0;i<rounds;i++){window.scrollTo({top:Math.max(900+i*1600,lastHeight-300),behavior:'instant'});await sleep(wantCmts?1800:900);const threads=document.querySelectorAll('ytd-comment-thread-renderer').length;const recs=document.querySelectorAll('yt-lockup-view-model').length;if(wantCmts&&threads>=cmtLimit&&(!wantRecs||recs>=recLimit))break;if(!wantCmts&&recs>=recLimit)break;if(document.body.scrollHeight===lastHeight&&i>1)break;lastHeight=document.body.scrollHeight;}}window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'instant'});await sleep(200);if(wantRecs){const lockups=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('yt-lockup-view-model'));for(const el of lockups){if(recommendations.length>=recLimit)break;const outer=el.querySelector('[class*="content-id-"]');let cid=null;if(outer){const m=outer.className.match(/content-id-([A-Za-z0-9_-]{6,})/);cid=m?m[1]:null;}if(!cid)continue;const titleEl=el.querySelector('a.ytLockupMetadataViewModelTitle, [class*="Title"]');const title=norm(titleEl?.textContent||'');if(!title)continue;const thumbBadge=norm(el.querySelector('yt-thumbnail-badge-view-model, yt-thumbnail-bottom-overlay-view-model')?.textContent||'');const metaText=norm(el.querySelector('yt-content-metadata-view-model')?.textContent||'');const isPlaylist=/^(PL|RD|OL|UU|LL|FL)/.test(cid)||/videos?$|^\d+\s*videos?$/i.test(thumbBadge);if(isPlaylist){recommendations.push({kind:'playlist',id:cid,title,url:'https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list='+cid,video_count:thumbBadge});}else{const chLink=el.querySelector('a[href*="/@"], a[href*="/channel/"]');let channel=norm(chLink?.textContent||'');const metaParts=metaText.split(/[•·]/).map(norm).filter(Boolean);const viewsRe=/([\d.,]+\s*[KMB]?)\s*views?/i;let views='';let published='';for(const p of metaParts){if(!views){const m=p.match(viewsRe);if(m){views=m[0];continue;}}if(!published&&/ago|streamed|premiered|scheduled|new$/i.test(p)){published=p.replace(/New$/i,'').trim();}}if(!channel&&metaParts.length){const first=metaParts[0];const vm=first.match(viewsRe);channel=vm?first.slice(0,vm.index).trim():first;}recommendations.push({kind:'video',id:cid,title,channel,url:'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v='+cid,duration:thumbBadge,views,published});}}}if(wantCmts){const threads=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('ytd-comment-thread-renderer'));for(const el of threads){if(comments.length>=cmtLimit)break;const author=norm(el.querySelector('#author-text span, #author-text')?.textContent||'');const text=norm(el.querySelector('#content-text')?.textContent||'');const likes=norm(el.querySelector('#vote-count-middle')?.textContent||'');const published=norm(el.querySelector('.published-time-text a, a[href*="lc="], #published-time-text a')?.textContent||'');if(!text&&!author)continue;comments.push({author,text,likes,published});}}return{url:location.href,metadata,recommendations,comments,counts:{recommendations:recommendations.length,comments:comments.length},warnings};
